perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a bowl of Oyakodon (chicken and egg rice bowl), featuring a bright orange raw egg yolk being gently poked with a bronze spoon to release the yolk. (2) A young woman is shown eating the dish with high enthusiasm, closing her eyes and nodding to express deliciousness. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen tutorial where onions are sliced, eggs are cracked into a bowl, and a bottle of 'Wan Jia Xiang' brand bonito soup base is showcased. (4) The cooking process follows: chicken is pan-fried, onions are added with the sauce, and beaten eggs are poured over the mixture. (5) Finally, the cooked mixture is poured over a steaming bowl of white rice, returning to the opening shot of the finished dish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat classical violin music begins immediately. Sounds of a spoon clinking against a bowl and the soft 'pop' of an egg yolk are heard. (2) Transition sounds (chimes/dings) mark the start of the tutorial. A female voice speaks in a friendly, enthusiastic tone, explaining the recipe and the sauce used. (3) Clear foley sounds are present: the 'thud-thud' of a knife cutting onions, the crisp 'crack' of eggshells, and the 'sizzle' of chicken hitting a hot pan. (4) The music continues throughout, maintaining a high energy level, ending with a celebratory chime as the woman gives a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '療癒滑嫩又邪惡 深夜親子丼' (Healing, smooth and wicked late-night Oyakodon). (2) Narrative text: '破蛋儀式' (Egg breaking ceremony), '滑順的半熟蛋' (Smooth half-cooked egg), '鮮醇醬汁的雞肉' (Chicken in rich, savory sauce). (3) Functional/Brand text: '萬家香鰹魚鮮湯露' (Wan Jia Xiang Bonito Soup Base) and '洋蔥切絲' (Shredded onions), '雞肉煎至金黃' (Fry chicken until golden).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Eating) -> Tutorial (Preparation & Cooking) -> Final Result & Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing the cooking and eating
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a white halter-neck tank top, appearing energetic and friendly.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, clean domestic kitchen with a gray countertop, induction stove, and minimalist cabinetry.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio lighting simulating a clean home kitchen environment.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Cross-fade and Hard cut with SFX cues

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a commercial advertisement for the 'Wan Jia Xiang' bonito soup base. It uses a sensory-rich 'food porn' intro to capture attention, followed by a simple tutorial to demonstrate how the product simplifies the process of making professional-quality Oyakodon at home.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator holds the bottle to the camera, names the brand specifically in the voiceover and text, and uses it as the primary seasoning for the dish.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Close-up egg yolk poking 'ritual' opening; high-saturation food styling; fast-paced editing with foley.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young adults or busy individuals looking for 'healing' (healing/comfort food) late-night meals that are easy to prepare.
